data.title: Ripple releases phased roadmap for quantum-resistant technology: plans to upgrade XRP Ledger by 2028
data.description: Ripple has announced a phased roadmap to achieve quantum-resistant upgrades for its XRP Ledger by 2028. This plan includes developing a "Quantum-Day" contingency plan to address potential quantum computing threats and collaborating with Project Eleven for preliminary testing and validation. Ripple states that this move aims to prepare for a post-quantum-secure transition, and the entire plan will proceed in four phases: Phase 1: Q-Day Contingency Preparedness (Already Underway). Establishing a Quantum Day (Q-Day) contingency response mechanism. If the existing classical encryption system is suddenly compromised, the network will immediately stop accepting traditional public-key signatures and forcibly migrate to quantum-secure accounts. Phase 2: Risk Assessment and Algorithm Testing (First Half of 2026). Comprehensively assessing the impact of post-quantum cryptography on the XRP Ledger network performance, storage, and bandwidth. Collaborating with Project Eleven to conduct validator-level testing and Devnet benchmarking, deploying the NIST-standardized ML-DSA quantum-secure signature scheme, and developing a post-quantum escrow wallet prototype. Phase 3: Devnet Hybrid Integration (Second Half of 2026). Integrate candidate post-quantum signature schemes in parallel with existing elliptic curve signatures on the developer network (Devnet), allowing developers to test performance and system impact without affecting the mainnet. Simultaneously explore post-quantum zero-knowledge proof primitives and homomorphic encryption for confidential transfers to advance the privacy and compliance capabilities of tokenized real-world assets on XRPL. Phase Four: Full Mainnet Upgrade (Target 2028). Submit a formal protocol amendment, which, after being approved by validators, will fully enable native post-quantum cryptography on the mainnet. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Kelp DAO Attacker Transfers Significant ETH to Special Address
data.description: According to Foresight News, PeckShield has reported that the attacker of Kelp DAO has transferred 30,765 ETH to a special address starting with 0x00000. This action is speculated to be a destruction of the funds.

data.title: PeckShield: Kelp DAO attackers suspected of transferring 30,765 ETH to a specific address.
data.description: According to PeckShield, Kelp DAO attackers transferred 30,765 ETH (approximately $70.92 million) to a special address starting with 0x00000, suspected of destroying the ETH.

data.title: Trump-Aligned Groups Amass $550 Million for Midterms
data.description: Trump-aligned groups have accumulated a $550 million war chest ahead of the midterm elections, as reported in a disclosure filed with the Federal Election Commission. According to NS3.AI, the funds were raised through MAGA Inc., with Diane Hendricks contributing $25 million, marking the largest disclosed donation. In total, Republican-affiliated House and Senate super PACs, along with Trump-aligned groups and MAGA Inc., had gathered $853 million prior to Monday's filing.

data.title: Analysis: 128-bit symmetric encryption remains secure; quantum computing poses the main threat to asymmetric cryptography.
data.description: Cryptography engineer Filippo Valsorda points out that the impact of quantum computing on current encryption systems is mainly concentrated on asymmetric algorithms (such as ECDSA and RSA), while its impact on symmetric encryption (such as AES and the SHA series) is limited. Grover's algorithm does not significantly weaken the security of 128-bit keys in practical scenarios. Although Grover's algorithm can theoretically accelerate brute-force attacks, it is difficult to parallelize, making actual attacks extremely costly. Even under ideal quantum computing conditions, the resources required to break AES-128 far exceed the cost of attacking elliptic curve cryptography using Shor's algorithm. Furthermore, standards organizations, including the National Institute of Standards and Technology (NIST), unanimously agree that AES-128 still meets post-quantum security requirements and does not need to be upgraded to a 256-bit key. Industry experts believe that focusing resources on replacing quantum-vulnerable asymmetric encryption schemes is the more pressing task at present.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Claims Operation Midnight Hammer Destroyed Iranian Nuclear Site
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump announced on Truth Social on April 21 that 'Operation Midnight Hammer' has completely destroyed a nuclear site in Iran. According to BlockBeats, Trump stated that the cleanup process will be long and arduous. He criticized media outlets like CNN and other networks for failing to give due credit to the pilots involved, accusing them of consistently trying to undermine and belittle their efforts.

data.title: China's first park-level token base has been established in Baotou.
data.description: The signing ceremony for China's first park-level token production and operation base project was officially held in Guyang County, Baotou City. This project integrates resources from operations, products, computing power, and energy sources to create China's first park-level token production and operation center, constructing a green industrial closed loop of "electricity input, token output." (Jinshi)

data.title: Liv Perrotto's Family Receives Significant Creator Fees from $ASTEROID Token
data.description: Liv Perrotto's mother, Rebecca Perrotto, has received over $70,000 in creator fees from the $ASTEROID token on the BAGS platform, according to Odaily. The total value of these fees amounts to approximately $111,000. This funding is derived from a 100% donation mechanism linked to transaction fees of the specific $ASTEROID token on the Solana blockchain. The initiative aims to support Liv's family and honor the space-themed Shiba Inu 'Asteroid' design she created during her lifetime.

data.title: Trump: Operation Midnight Hammer to completely eliminate Iranian nuclear fallout site
data.description: US President Trump stated that Operation Midnight Hammer completely destroyed the nuclear dust base inside Iran. Therefore, the cleanup will be a long and arduous process. The fake news media CNN and other corrupt media networks and platforms have failed to give our great pilot the praise he deserves, instead always trying to belittle and despise him. They are losers. (Jinshi)

data.title: Solana Foundation Chair Advocates for Stablecoin Adoption and Universal Basic Ownership
data.description: Lily Liu, chair of the Solana Foundation, emphasized the potential benefits of broader stablecoin adoption in reducing barriers for users accessing global capital markets. According to NS3.AI, Liu also highlighted the concept of 'universal basic ownership' as a strategy to address job displacement caused by advancements in artificial intelligence. Additionally, she noted that Solana is actively developing infrastructure for settlement and execution.

data.title: The Smarter Web Company Plans $2 Million Fundraising Amid Bitcoin Holdings
data.description: London-based technology firm, The Smarter Web Company, is set to raise $2 million in funding. According to Foresight News, the company currently holds 2,706 bitcoins. The fundraising initiative aims to bolster its financial position and support future growth strategies.

data.title: Sign Token Scheduled for Significant Unlock
data.description: Sign (SIGN) is set to unlock approximately 20.778 million tokens on April 28 at 18:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token release is part of the scheduled unlock events tracked by Web3 asset data platform RootData.

data.title: Moonbirds Scheduled for Token Unlock on April 28
data.description: Moonbirds is set to unlock approximately 27.08 million tokens on April 28 at 13:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token unlock is part of the data provided by Web3 asset data platform RootData. The event marks a significant moment for Moonbirds as it continues to develop its presence in the market.

data.title: Plasma Token Unlock Scheduled for April 28
data.description: Plasma (XPL) is set to unlock approximately 88.89 million tokens on April 28 at 12:00 UTC+8. According to ChainCatcher, this token unlock is part of the scheduled release by Web3 asset data platform RootData. The event is expected to impact the market dynamics of Plasma, as the release of a significant number of tokens could influence trading activities and investor decisions.

data.title: Polymarket Account Places $130,000 Bet on Timberwolves in Game 2 Against Nuggets
data.description: A Polymarket account with a 56% win rate has placed a $130,000 bet on the Timberwolves to defeat the Nuggets in the Western Conference first-round Game 2. According to NS3.AI, the bet was made at an average opening price of 27 cents. The game is scheduled to tip off at 10:30 AM Beijing time today, with the Nuggets currently leading the series 1–0.

data.title: Australian Dollar Holds Strong Potential for Carry Trade, Analyst Says
data.description: On April 21, Jin10 reported that Philip Wee, a senior foreign exchange strategist at DBS Bank, highlighted the Australian dollar as the most attractive option for carry trade investments. According to Wee, futures market pricing indicates a 74% probability that the Reserve Bank of Australia will raise interest rates for the third consecutive time during its meeting on May 4-5. Wee noted that the rate hike at the March meeting established the Australian dollar as the currency with the highest yield, providing a 'higher and longer-lasting' rate support. He added that if the Australian dollar can replicate last week's rebound against the U.S. dollar, the currency pair might surpass the 0.7200 resistance level observed last week.

data.title: Global Markets Stabilize Amid Potential Iran-U.S. Peace Talks
data.description: Global markets have experienced significant fluctuations, but recent news of potential peace talks between Iran and the United States has brought stability to regional markets. According to Jin10, the South Korean KOSPI index rose by approximately 2%, while Japan's Nikkei 225 index increased by over 1%. Analysts highlight that the future developments are crucial for investors. Many investors are hesitant to withdraw their investments, as a successful agreement could lead to a rapid surge in stock markets. Currently, all parties are adopting a wait-and-see approach, with the market closely monitoring whether any form of negotiations will take place in Islamabad. There is a general expectation among investors that reaching a preliminary agreement is more likely than a comprehensive one. The market is reacting to a shift in sentiment from optimism to concern. However, it is widely believed that the most severe phase of the crisis and the resulting energy supply disruptions may have already passed.

data.title: Strategy Holdings Surpass IBIT to Become the World's Largest Bitcoin Holding Entity
data.description: According to Odaily, Strategy (MSTR) has surpassed BlackRock's iShares Bitcoin Trust ETF (IBIT) to become the single entity holding the most Bitcoin globally. As of April 20th, MSTR holds a total of 815,061 BTC, with a total cost of approximately $61.56 billion and an average price of $75,527. The BTC Yield since the beginning of 2026 has reached 9.5%.

data.title: Gasoline Prices in Australia Decline Amid Government Measures
data.description: Gasoline prices in Australia have decreased for the third consecutive week, providing some relief to consumers. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the decline is attributed to government interventions aimed at mitigating the impact of the ongoing conflict in Iran. The measures have helped to alleviate the financial burden on motorists, who have been facing rising fuel costs due to geopolitical tensions. The Australian government continues to monitor the situation closely, ensuring that the measures remain effective in stabilizing fuel prices.

data.title: A whale actively bought Aave ETH deposit certificates (aEthWETH) and made a profit of $330,000.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ember, a whale named 0x8ad earned 143 ETH (US$330,000) by actively buying aEthWETH (Aave ETH deposit certificates). In the past 13 hours, he withdrew 13,000 ETH (US$30 million) from the exchange, then bought 13,143 aEthWETH (Aave ETH deposit certificates) via Swap, and then used aEthWETH to repay his original ETH loan on Aave at a 1:1 ratio.
